commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio logs -n yanxi-validation uccl-ep-upstream-launcher-7v7w6 > /tmp/s2-full.log 2>&1; wc -l /tmp/s2-full.log'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'aws s3 cp /tmp/s2-full.log s3://yanxi-validation-788668107894/logs/s2-uccl-upstream-full.log --region us-east-2'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'grep -v -E "NCCL INFO|\\[Service thread\\]|Abort COMPLETE|NET/OFI MR cache" /tmp/s2-full.log | head -120'
